title: [Skyship, Core]
description: A towering gear-lined obelisk of panels, levers, and twisting metal rises out of the floor in the middle of the area, carrying all the way to the ceiling, where a series of thick pipes curl out and upward from it like limbs on an octopus.  Steam escapes the joints of these pipes, clouding the area around the obelisk in a haze.  The whir of machinery throughout the area creates a constant, rumbling din, with periodic vibrations rumbling the walkway and shaking the obelisk.
